# Arthur Bernard — Portfolio

## About
Arthur Bernard is a DevOps & Cloud Engineer based in France.
Former student at 42 (completed core curriculum).
Focused on automation, infrastructure as code, CI/CD, and cloud-native technologies.

## Stack
AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Ansible, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), Python, Bash, Prometheus, Grafana, Loki.

## Site Structure
- /en/ — English homepage (projects, about, contact)
- /fr/ — French homepage
- /en/blog/ — Blog listing (English)
- /fr/blog/ — Blog listing (French)
- /en/resume — Resume (English)
- /fr/resume — Resume (French)

## Blog Articles
1. From Pastry to Development — Career switch story
2. 42 Piscine and Core Curriculum — Experience at 42 school
3. Glasck — First Production Launch — Deploying a SaaS project
4. My DevOps Roadmap — Learning path and priorities
5. AWS Infrastructure Automation With Terraform & Ansible — IaC project on AWS Free Tier
6. How I Failed My Criteo Interview — Honest post-mortem on a missed SRE interview
7. How I Landed My Internship at Alan — Python learned in 10 days, 4-step process
8. My Learning System: Obsidian + Claude — GitHub repo as knowledge vault, AI-assisted learning without dependency
